name: Predaplant Byblisp
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>捕食植物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プレデター・プランツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ビブリスプ
desc: If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Predaplant" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Predaplant Byblisp". If a monster with a Predator Counter is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Byblisp" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Predaplant" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Predaplant Byblisp". If a monster with a Predator Counter is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Byblisp" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Predaplant" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Predaplant Byblisp". If a monster with a Predator Counter is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Predaplant Byblisp" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
